backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining Lead and UserProfile types, with endpoints for submitting/deleting/retrieving leads and managing user profiles, protected by admin/user access control via included mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (logo, PM Surya Ghar phases, etc.) to their corresponding frontend source files and component dependencies with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, theme, and key changes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'TRI-GITA SERVICES', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, Services, etc.) within a LanguageProvider context wrapper.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank finance stats (loan percentage, customer payment, tenure) with a shimmer animation and a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component with a pulse ring animation, hover tooltip using the correct translation key, and a link to the WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer with navy background displaying brand info, clickable phone/email/address contact details, a WhatsApp button, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), and a WhatsApp CTA button, plus a hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards using i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form with validation for name, phone, email, city, and system size fields; on submit it posts to the backend via a mutation hook and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Intersection-observer-animated section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central and state subsidy breakdowns in styled cards.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Detailed PM Surya Ghar scheme explainer covering benefits, eligibility, and a four-phase step-by-step installation/subsidy process, plus a 'Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi' highlights block.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-column services section showcasing residential and commercial solar offerings with feature lists, service images, and CTA buttons that scroll to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent themes, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty type using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, showing icons, titles, and descriptions sourced from i18n translations.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing it via a useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and exposing login/clear functions via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the leads query cache on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains the full multi-language (English, Hindi, Odia) translation strings for all UI sections including header, hero, scheme info, warranty, and more.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: A hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage context with the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes using OKLCH, custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing a solar vendor website for Bhagyalaxmi Construction (Odisha) covering PM Surya Ghar registration phases, with versioned feature records and image requirements.
